errors.remote_images_not_allowed: Remote images are not allowed in signatures.
errors.save_failed: Something went wrong while saving your signature.

maximum_image_count.help: When the user exceeds the maximum image count in their signature, they will be prevented from saving until the image count is accordingly.

maximum_char_limit.help: When the user exceeds the maximum character limit in their signature, they will be prevented from saving until the character count is accordingly.

allow_remote_images.help: When disabled, users cannot use images hosted on other websites in their signature. This prevents off-site images from tracking the IP address of everyone who views the signature.

allowed_image_hosts.help: When remote images are disabled, images from these hosts are still permitted (in addition to your own forum). Enter one host per line, e.g. your CDN such as cdn.example.com.

allow_inline_editing.help: When enabled, users can edit their signature while viewing a post.
